findings.claim: ADR 0002 treats the npm package @astrojs/cloudflare (version 12) as the live SSR adapter underpinning the platform.
findings.consequence: If the adapter has since changed major version or been swapped, the platform premise of ADR 0002 has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0002 treats global.css as the live file into which design tokens are ported.
findings.consequence: If global.css no longer exists or no longer holds tokens, the styling premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0003 treats the kysely package as a live, currently-present dependency of Better Auth.

citations.quote: Better Auth depends on kysely, and a newer kysely broke the Worker bundle.

findings.consequence: If kysely is no longer a dependency, this premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0003 treats src/lib/auth.ts as the live file implementing the per-request auth factory.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists or no longer implements createAuth, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0003 treats package.json overrides as the live mechanism pinning kysely to 0.28.17.
findings.consequence: If package.json no longer contains this override, the pin premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0003 treats Better Auth as a live, currently-installed named software dependency at version 1.5+.
findings.consequence: If Better Auth has been replaced or upgraded past what this record assumes, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0004 treats public/assets as the live path where the vendored font engine is served.
findings.consequence: If the engine is no longer served from this path, the vendoring premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0004 treats opentype.js as a live, currently-vendored dependency used for OTF/CFF-to-TTF work.
findings.consequence: If opentype.js is no longer part of the vendored engine, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0004 treats wawoff2 as a live, currently-vendored WASM compressor dependency.
findings.consequence: If wawoff2 is no longer vendored, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0005 treats opentype.js as a live dependency whose checksum-writing behavior is a currently-relevant root cause.

citations.quote: opentype.js writing a table checksum one-off

findings.consequence: If opentype.js is no longer used in the build path, the root-cause premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0005 treats src/lib/sfnt.ts as the live file implementing checksum repair.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists or lacks fixSfntChecksums, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0005 treats fontTools as the live, currently-used Python validator.
findings.consequence: If fontTools is no longer used for validation, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0005 treats fontkit as a live dependency explicitly distrusted for validation.

citations.quote: never rely on fontkit/opentype.js to validate

findings.consequence: If fontkit is no longer present in the stack, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0006 treats app.ts as the live file implementing the vanilla masthead cycler.
findings.consequence: If app.ts no longer exists or no longer holds this cycler, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0007 treats public/_headers as the live file controlling immutable caching of the vendored engine.
findings.consequence: If public/_headers no longer exists, the caching premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0007 treats astro.config.mjs as the live file injecting the __ENGINE_V__ cache-bust token.
findings.consequence: If astro.config.mjs no longer performs this injection, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0007 treats make.astro as the live file carrying the page script tags that consume the cache-bust token.
findings.consequence: If make.astro no longer exists or no longer references the token, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0007 treats maker.ts as the live file holding ENGINE_VERSION.
findings.consequence: If maker.ts no longer defines ENGINE_VERSION, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0007 treats font-engine-worker.js as the live worker file reading the ?v= token off its own URL.

citations.quote: font-engine-worker.js read the ?v off its own URL

findings.consequence: If font-engine-worker.js no longer performs this, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0010 treats font-engine-gpos.js as the live file implementing the GPOS PairPos writer.
findings.consequence: If font-engine-gpos.js no longer exists, the kerning premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0012 treats color-orchestrator.js as the live file running the colour pipeline on the main thread.
findings.consequence: If color-orchestrator.js no longer exists, the colour build premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0012 treats wawoff2 as a live dependency running on the main thread for colour builds.
findings.consequence: If wawoff2 is no longer used, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0015 treats src/lib/ratelimit.ts as the live file implementing the KV rate limiter.
findings.consequence: If src/lib/ratelimit.ts no longer exists, the rate-limiting premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0016 treats src/middleware.ts as the live file setting security headers and CSP.
findings.consequence: If src/middleware.ts no longer exists or no longer sets CSP, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0017 treats src/lib/email.ts as the live helper sending transactional email via Resend.
findings.consequence: If src/lib/email.ts no longer exists, the email premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0018 treats src/lib/banned-words.ts as the live code-managed banlist file.
findings.consequence: If src/lib/banned-words.ts no longer exists, the moderation premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0020 treats .dev.vars as the live local config file holding the localhost BETTER_AUTH_URL override.
findings.consequence: If .dev.vars no longer exists or no longer holds this override, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0023 treats Maker.tsx as the live file rendering the OG/social card client-side.
findings.consequence: If Maker.tsx no longer contains renderOgCard, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0024 treats a file named _headers as the live mechanism for immutable static asset caching.
findings.consequence: If the _headers file no longer exists, the caching premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0026 treats wrangler.cron.jsonc as the live config file defining the standalone cron worker.
findings.consequence: If wrangler.cron.jsonc no longer exists, the cron-worker premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0027 treats vitest as the live unit/engine-math test runner.
findings.consequence: If vitest is no longer a dependency, the test-harness premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0027 treats @playwright/test as the live e2e test dependency.
findings.consequence: If @playwright/test is no longer a dependency, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0027 treats .github/workflows/ci.yml as the live CI workflow file wiring the test harness.
findings.consequence: If this workflow file no longer exists, the CI-wiring premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0027 treats fontTools as the live independent validator run in CI.

citations.quote: run one built font through fontTools

findings.consequence: If fontTools is no longer run in CI, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0027 treats e2e/fixtures/corpus as the live directory holding the typographic corpus faces.
findings.consequence: If this directory no longer exists, the corpus-lint premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0028 treats .github/workflows/ci.yml as the live deploy job file.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer defines the deploy job, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0028 treats astro and wrangler as the live CLI packages composing the deploy command.
findings.consequence: If either astro or wrangler is no longer used in the deploy path, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0029 treats SEED.md as the live file documenting the honesty trail for launch-wall stand-ins.
findings.consequence: If SEED.md no longer exists, the documentation premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0035 treats src/lib/maker.ts as the live implementation location for the connect feature.
findings.consequence: If src/lib/maker.ts no longer holds this implementation, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0035 treats Maker.tsx as a live implementation file for the connect feature.
findings.consequence: If Maker.tsx no longer exists, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0035 treats make.astro as a live implementation file for the connect feature.
findings.consequence: If make.astro no longer exists, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0036 treats font-engine-gsub.js as the live hand-written GSUB table file.
findings.consequence: If font-engine-gsub.js no longer exists, the natural-variation premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0037 treats src/lib/maker.ts as the live file holding all four baseline-hardening passes.
findings.consequence: If src/lib/maker.ts no longer holds these passes, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0038 treats src/lib/maker.ts as the live file implementing the connector-height snap pre-pass.
findings.consequence: If src/lib/maker.ts no longer implements this pass, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0039 treats src/lib/maker.ts (specifically around line 2013) as the live location shipping the connect GPOS kern feature flags.
findings.consequence: If this file/location no longer contains the described feature flags, the premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0041 treats docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-01-connection-point-spec.md as the live spec file scoping the connection-point milestone.
findings.consequence: If this spec file no longer exists, the milestone-scoping premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0047 treats connected-cursive-nano-v2.png as a live corpus fixture file.
findings.consequence: If this fixture file no longer exists, the regression-protection premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0047 treats e2e/variation.spec.ts as the live e2e test file gating the palette build.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists, the palette-e2e premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0047 treats test/maker-connect.test.ts as the live unit test file protecting the entry-reach gate.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists, the unit-test premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0051 treats fontkit as the live package used to shape probe texts through GSUB/GPOS in node.
findings.consequence: If fontkit is no longer used for this purpose, the sensor premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0052 treats test/seam-feedback.test.ts as the live test file locking calibrated seam verdicts.
findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists, the calibration-lock premise has decayed.

findings.claim: ADR 0052 treats test/fixtures/seam-sensor as the live directory of sensor JSON fixtures used to lock verdicts.
findings.consequence: If this directory no longer exists, the fixture-lock premise has decayed.
